title: The Hottest Chilli Sauce in Newcastle
content:
The Hottest Chilli Sauce in Newcastle

We are selling the Hottest Chilli Sauce in Newcastle. There is a big range of them from mild to wow at Kards & Kandy!

SO WHAT IS THE SCOVILLE SCALE?

Scientist Wilbur Scoville Named The Scoville Scale and Scoville Heat Unit (SHU) in 1912. At the time, Scoville worked for a pharmaceutical company named Parke-Davis where he developed a test called the "Scoville Organoleptic Test" which is used to measure a chili pepper's pungency and heat.

THE SCOVILLE SCALE

We carry brands like Ass Kickin', Blair's Hot Sauce, Culley's, The Chilli Factory. All the famous by making the hottest chili sauce in the world. Culley's has become a household name for hot sauces in New Zealand and it is pretty easy to find a bottle of their sauce in most supermarkets.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Scoville Scale and how does it measure chilli heat?

The Scoville Scale, developed by scientist Wilbur Scoville in 1912, measures the pungency and heat level of chilli peppers using Scoville Heat Units (SHU). The higher the SHU number, the hotter the chilli sauce, helping you choose the right heat level for your taste.

Where can I buy the hottest chilli sauce in Newcastle?

You can find the hottest chilli sauces at Kards & Kandy in Newcastle, which stocks a wide range of heat levels from mild to extremely hot options.

What brands of hot chilli sauce do you stock?

We carry premium hot sauce brands including Ass Kickin', Blair's Hot Sauce, Culley's, and The Chilli Factory—all renowned for producing some of the hottest chilli sauces in the world.

Is Culley's hot sauce easy to find in Australia?

Culley's is a household name for hot sauces originating from New Zealand and is stocked at Kards & Kandy in Newcastle, though it's primarily found in most New Zealand supermarkets.

Can I find mild chilli sauces as well as extremely hot ones?

Yes! We offer a big range of chilli sauces from mild to extremely hot, so whether you're new to spicy foods or a heat enthusiast, there's an option for your preference.
